This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. Provide helpful, relevant information that adds value to the conversation."},"item_number":{"type":["number","string"],"description":"The issue, pull request, or discussion number to comment on. This is the numeric ID from the GitHub URL (e.g., 123 in github.com/owner/repo/issues/123). Can also be a temporary_id (e.g., 'aw_abc123') from a previously created issue in the same workflow run. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error."},"temporary_id":{"type":"string","pattern":"^aw_[A-Za-z0-9]{3,12}$","description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. Use this to confirm workflow completion and provide visibility when analysis is complete but no changes or outputs are required (e.g., 'No issues found', 'All checks passed'). This ensures the workflow produces human-visible output even when no other actions are taken.","inputSchema":{"type":"object","required":["message"],"properties":{"message":{"type":"string","description":"Status or completion message to log. CONSTRAINTS: Maximum 1 comment(s) can be added.","inputSchema":{"additionalProperties":false,"properties":{"body":{"description":"The comment text in Markdown format. This is the 'body' field - do not use 'comment_body' or other variations. If omitted, the tool will attempt to resolve the target from the current workflow context (triggering issue, PR, or discussion). If auto-targeting fails (e.g., for schedule or workflow_dispatch triggers), the tool call will fail with an error.","type":["number","string"]},"secrecy":{"description":"Confidentiality level of the message content (e.g., \"public\", \"internal\", \"private\").","type":"string"},"temporary_id":{"description":"Unique temporary identifier for this comment. 2026-03-26T01:03:10.2793209Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-26T01:02:54.422408767Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57488,\"title\":\"[Provisioning Generator] Child resource location property incorrectly marked as required instead of output-only\",\"body\":\"## Description\\n\\nThe provisioning generator incorrectly marks `location` as `isRequired: true` for child resources (e.g., `KeyVaultSecret`) when the TypeSpec definition has `@visibility(Lifecycle.Read)` (read-only) and is optional.\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nFor `Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets`, the TypeSpec definition is:\\n```typespec\\n@visibility(Lifecycle.Read)\\nlocation?: string;\\n```\\n\\nThe old reflection-based generator correctly generated:\\n```csharp\\n_location = DefineProperty(\\u0026#34;Location\\u0026#34;, [\\u0026#34;location\\u0026#34;], isOutput: true);\\n```\\n\\n### Actual behavior\\n\\nThe new TypeSpec-based provisioning generator generates:\\n```csharp\\n_location = DefineProperty(nameof(Location), new string[] { \\u0026#34;location\\u0026#34; }, isRequired: true);\\n```\\n\\nThis causes `location: location` to appear in the Bicep output for child resources, which is incorrect — the [Bicep reference](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets?pivots=deployment-language-bicep) confirms `location` is not a settable property on `vaults/secrets`.\\n\\n### TypeSpec reference\\n\\nhttps://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/[REDACTED]/specification/keyvault/resource-manager/Microsoft.KeyVault/KeyVault/Secret.tsp\\n\\n### Impact\\n\\nAny provisioning library regenerated with the new generator will emit spurious `location` properties for child resources.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57488\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"ArcturusZhang\",\"id\":10554446,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/ArcturusZhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10554446?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-26T01:00:43Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-26T01:00:43Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}

2026-03-26T01:03:10.2811238Z {"timestamp":"2026-03-26T01:02:54.602216306Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":57488,\"title\":\"[Provisioning Generator] Child resource location property incorrectly marked as required instead of output-only\",\"body\":\"## Description\\n\\nThe provisioning generator incorrectly marks `location` as `isRequired: true` for child resources (e.g., `KeyVaultSecret`) when the TypeSpec definition has `@visibility(Lifecycle.Read)` (read-only) and is optional.\\n\\n### Expected behavior\\n\\nFor `Microsoft.KeyVault/vaults/secrets`, the TypeSpec definition is:\\n```typespec\\n@visibility(Lifecycle.Read)\\nlocation?: string;\\n```\\n\\nThe old reflection-based generator correctly generated:\\n```csharp\\n_location = DefineProperty(\\u0026#34;Location\\u0026#34;, [\\u0026#34;location\\u0026#34;], isOutput: true);\\n```\\n\\n### Actual behavior\\n\\nThe new TypeSpec-based provisioning generator generates:\\n```csharp\\n_location = DefineProperty(nameof(Location), new string[] { \\u0026#34;location\\u0026#34; }, isRequired: true);\\n```\\n\\nThis causes `location: location` to appear in the Bicep output for child resources, which is incorrect — the [Bicep reference](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/azure/templates/microsoft.keyvault/vaults/secrets?pivots=deployment-language-bicep) confirms `location` is not a settable property on `vaults/secrets`.\\n\\n### TypeSpec reference\\n\\nhttps://github.com/Azure/azure-rest-api-specs/blob/[REDACTED]/specification/keyvault/resource-manager/Microsoft.KeyVault/KeyVault/Secret.tsp\\n\\n### Impact\\n\\nAny provisioning library regenerated with the new generator will emit spurious `location` properties for child resources.\",\"state\":\"open\",\"html_url\":\"https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-net/issues/57488\",\"user\":{\"login\":\"ArcturusZhang\",\"id\":10554446,\"profile_url\":\"https://github.com/ArcturusZhang\",\"avatar_url\":\"https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/10554446?v=4\"},\"author_association\":\"MEMBER\",\"reactions\":{\"total_count\":1,\"+1\":0,\"-1\":0,\"laugh\":0,\"confused\":0,\"heart\":0,\"hooray\":0,\"rocket\":0,\"eyes\":1},\"created_at\":\"2026-03-26T01:00:43Z\",\"updated_at\":\"2026-03-26T01:00:43Z\"}","type":"text"}]}}}
